title: Caliz I: Wrapping JVM 11 and learning about Graal AOT
summary: First steps toward an acceptable scripting experience with single-source-file execution and Graal native images
content:
First steps toward an acceptable scripting experience with single-source-file execution and Graal native images

With Java 11's single-source-file execution and Graal's blazing fast native images (aka ahead-of-time compilation), it should be possible to create an acceptable scripting experience with Java. Here's the first part of a live stream where I did exactly that.

Thanks to everyone who was there. 🙏 I had an amazing time.

Links to follow up:

  • Scripting Java
  • Graal AOT

Watch the video.
